← Switch to User app
⚓

PORTDA Vendor

For Marine Service Providers

The seller-side of PORTDA — for pilotage companies, tug operators, bunker suppliers, ship chandlers, surveyors and every other marine service vendor. Win bids, manage jobs, get paid.

12
Modules
~70
Screens
B2B
Marketplace

Modules

Each module mirrors the equivalent user-side flow, flipped to the vendor's perspective.

⚓
MODULE 01

Splash & Onboarding

First-launch intro for marine service providers — value pitch and permissions.

4 screens→
⚷
MODULE 02

Authentication

Vendor company sign-up: services, sub-categories, multi-location coverage, DGS / GST / PAN verification, login & recovery.

8 screens→
⌂
MODULE 03

Dashboard

Daily snapshot: new Requests, active jobs, today's earnings, ratings.

4 screens→
📥
MODULE 04

Request Inbox

Live feed of open requests in your categories. Filter, accept, decline. Premium-lead paywall for Commission users.

6 screens→
₹
MODULE 05

Quotations

Build a quote: PDF upload, line items, milestones, terms. Negotiate & resend.

7 screens→
✉
MODULE 06

Chat

Direct messaging with shipping companies, agents and port authorities.

2 screens→
◧
MODULE 07

Jobs

Confirmed work: accept, update status, log milestones, mark complete.

7 screens→
💰
MODULE 08

Payouts & Billing

Wallet, receivables, bank settlements. Subscription & commission ledger in one place.

10 screens→
★
MODULE 09

Reviews & Reputation

See incoming ratings, respond to reviews, improve your profile.

3 screens→
⚐
MODULE 10

Notifications

New Request in your category, quote approved, payment received, dispute opened.

3 screens→
⊚
MODULE 11

Company Profile

Service categories, sub-services, served ports, licenses, insurance, bank account.

7 screens→
⚙
MODULE 12

Settings & Misc

Terms, privacy, app settings, logout, deactivate vendor account.

5 screens→
